posts.author: rich-ecologic-sips (Rich Amos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can’t see that this is a problem anyone has asked about already but all of us at my work have the following issue in Outlook:

When we get an email notification of for example someone has commented on an item the message box area of the email with the text is a monumentous scroll way down the email through a large grey area.

Any ideas what’s causing this?

Screenshot 2022-08-15 1302551086×804 34 KB

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

have you tried to reupload the company-logo in admin-settings of Monday?
Looks like there is an error with header settings. Be sure to have correct picture solution(s).

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rich-ecologic-sips

Were you able to give @Silas suggestion a try?
Would love to know if this fixed the issue for you!
